_schema.description: Ares per-engine outcome log. One record per closed trade.

fields.signals_at_entry: dict — engine-specific signals logged at entry
fields.forward_return_Nd: float|null — N-day return anchored at entry_date+N from entry_price (N from IC_HORIZON_DAYS). Never exit-anchored.
fields.ic_valid: bool — true if this trade counts toward IC calibration (terminal exit, full position)
